incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Let's look closely: how many stars should you place for Yellow?

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

steps.text: You're working on it. Yellow needs 8 stars. Count as you click: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System places 8 stars one by one in Yellow row, counting aloud: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Yellow counted 8, so I place 8 stars. I click once for each star: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8. See how that works?
